statics.description: Cards in graveyards can't be the targets of spells or abilities.

replacements.description: If CARDNAME would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

triggers.description: Whenever one or more creature cards are put into graveyards from anywhere, investigate. This ability triggers only once each turn. (Create a colorless Clue artifact token with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")
